feed.title: Toyota Global
feed.subtitle: Toyota news from the USA, Europe, the global newsroom, Toyota Connected, and Toyota Research Institute, in one feed.

entry.title: GAZOO Racing to further advance FCEV* development through the Dakar Rally
entry.content: GAZOO Racing will enter the DKR GR FC Hilux, a fuel cell electric vehicle (FCEV), in the 2027 Dakar Rally as part of its commitment to making ever-better motorsports-bred cars. The project represents a new challenge to demonstrate hydrogen fuel cell technology in the demanding conditions of the Dakar Rally. Based on the DKR GR Hilux, which has already proven itself in Dakar’s top category, the DKR GR FC Hilux replaces its petrol engine with Toyota’s fuel cell system. It emits no CO₂ while dri...

entry.title: GAZOO Racing to further advance FCEV development through the Dakar Rally
entry.content: GAZOO Racing will enter the DKR GR FC Hilux, a fuel cell electric vehicle (FCEV), in the 2027 Dakar Rally as part of its commitment to making ever-better motorsports-bred cars.

entry.title: Contactile named Propel-AIR 2026 finalist for robot touch

entry.title: Contactile named Propel-AIR 2026 finalist for robot touch
entry.content: Contactile named Propel-AIR 2026 finalist for robot touch

entry.title: Toyota Recalls Certain Model Year 2026 Toyota Grand Highlander and Lexus TX vehicles
entry.content:
PLANO, Texas (July 8, 2026) — Toyota is conducting a safety recall campaign involving certain model year 2026 Toyota Grand Highlander and Lexus TX vehicles in North America. Approximately 5,400 vehicles are involved in this recall. The rear axle carriers in […] The post Toyota Recalls Certain Model Year 2026 Toyota Grand Highlander and
Lexus TX vehicles appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: We Have a Winner! Who Claimed the Crown in the U.S. Camry Customization Showdown?
entry.content: The U.S. Camry Customization Showdown, one of three contests that kicked off at this yearâs Tokyo Auto Salon, was decided at the Super Taikyu 24-hour race. We look at what this matchup means to Morizo.

entry.title: Sydney Robotics Firm Contactile Named Finalist In Propel-AIR 2026
entry.content: Sydney Robotics Firm Contactile Named Finalist In Propel-AIR 2026

entry.title: KAKEZAN 2026 Up Close: An Ever-Evolving City Where People and Technology Meet
entry.content: KAKEZAN 2026 showcased diverse technologies ranging from tech by Woven by Toyota to Akio Toyoda AI. Toyota Times visited the venue, energized by the addition of new Inventors.

entry.title: Toyota and onX Expand Partnership to Advance Trail Access, Stewardship and Outdoor Exploration
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (July 7, 2026) – Toyota and onX, the nation's leading outdoor digital navigation platform, today announced an expansion of their partnership to empower more people to confidently access and enjoy the outdoors while supporting responsible recreation and trail stewardship. The post Toyota and onX Expand Partnership to Advance Trail Access, Stewardship and Outdoor Exploration appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Behind the Scenes: Three Years of Developing the GR Yaris M Concept
entry.content: The GR Yaris M Concept, a midship 4WD GR Yaris, attracted a lot of interest from visitors when it was unveiled at the 2025 Toyota Auto Salon. We have been following its development from 2023 to the present.

entry.title: Toyota To Invest $3.6bn In Texas, Move Production From Mexico
entry.content: Toyota To Invest $3.6bn In Texas, Move Production From Mexico

entry.title: Toyota Announces $3.6 Billion Investment in San Antonio Plant in Texas
entry.content: Toyota Motor North America, Inc., Toyota's North American headquarters, today announced an investment of 3.6 billion USD in its San Antonio plant in Texas, including the establishment of a second vehicle assembly line.

entry.title: Toyota Announces $3.6B Expansion, 2,000 New Jobs at its San Antonio Plant
entry.content:
SAN ANTONIO (July 6, 2026) – Toyota Motor North America (TMNA) announced it will invest $3.6 billion to expand its San Antonio manufacturing campus with a second vehicle assembly line to support the Tacoma truck. The expansion will create 2,000 new, high-quality jobs and add 2.5 million square feet to Toyota Texas, doubling its size by 2030. The post Toyota Announces $3.6B Expansion,
2,000 New Jobs at its San Antonio Plant appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: USC Research Advances Fairer Algorithms and Smarter Markets at EC 2026
entry.content: USC Research Advances Fairer Algorithms and Smarter Markets at EC 2026

entry.title: Behind the Scenes: Three Years of Developing the GR Yaris M Concept
entry.content: The GR Yaris M Concept, a midship 4WD GR Yaris, attracted a lot of interest from visitors when it was unveiled at the 2025 Toyota Auto Salon. We have been following its development from 2023 to the present.

entry.title: 6 Hours of Sao Paulo: Preview Le Mans winners TOYOTA RACING bound for Brazil
entry.content: TOYOTA RACING returns to action after its historic Le Mans 24 Hours victory when the 2026 FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC) resumes in Brazil for the 6 Hours of Sao Paulo (10-12 July).

entry.title: 6 Hours of São Paulo - Le Mans winners TOYOTA RACING bound for Brazil
entry.content: The team overcame adversity and an ultra-competitive Hypercar field to win the 94th Le Mans 24 Hours last month, its sixth victory in the legendary French race. A double podium also helped TOYOTA RACING move into the lead of the manufacturers’ World Championship by 36 points. Victory for Mike Conway, Kamui Kobayashi and Nyck de Vries at La Sarthe elevated the #7 TR010 HYBRID crew to the lead of the drivers’ standings, and they take a four-point advantage into the South American round of the W...

entry.title: AI To Prevent Suicide; AI To Better Diagnose Respiratory Diseases: USC Viterbi and USC Stevens at ACL 2026
entry.content: AI To Prevent Suicide; AI To Better Diagnose Respiratory Diseases: USC Viterbi and USC Stevens at ACL 2026

entry.title: NÃ¼rburgring & Super Taikyu: A Virtuous Cycle? -- Hydrogen Engine Year Six Interview with Automotive Analyst Shinya Yamamoto
entry.content: For the sixth straight year, Toyotaâs hydrogen-engine Corolla tackled the 24-hour endurance race at Fuji Speedway. As usual, we asked automotive analyst Shinya Yamamoto to offer his take on where things stand.

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Chairman Toyoda Presides Over "Frank and Honest Dialogue"
entry.content: Chairing his first general meeting in three years, how did Akio Toyoda respond to questions from Toyota's shareholders?

entry.content: AI in the Workplace: 5 Ways Companies Are Using Generative AI

entry.title: Toyota Motor North America Reports June, Second Quarter 2026 U.S. Sales Results
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (July 1, 2026) – Toyota Motor North America (TMNA) today reported June 2026 U.S. sales of 212,793 vehicles, up 10.1 percent on a volume basis and up 5.7 percent on a daily selling rate (DSR) basis compared to June 2025. Sales of electrified vehicles for the month totaled 122,063, up 35.0 percent on a volume basis and up 29.6 percent on a DSR basis, representing 57.4 percent of total sales volume. The post Toyota Motor North America Reports June, Second Quarter 2026 U.S. Sales Res...

entry.title: Chairman Toyoda Presides Over "Frank and Honest Dialogue"
entry.content: Chairing his first general meeting in three years, how did Akio Toyoda respond to questions from Toyotaâs shareholders?

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Determined to Take Responsibility - President Kon's Heartfelt Commitment to His New Role
entry.content: In his first general meeting as president, what was Kenta Kon's message to Toyota shareholders?

entry.title: Too Afraid To Ask: Internal Combustion Engine Types
entry.content: Do you know the difference between a four-cylinder, V6, and V8 engine? Quick hint: it’s not just about size. It’s about how much force each one can make, how much fuel they need, and what kind of driving they’re best […] The post Too Afraid To Ask: Internal Combustion Engine Types appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Joby Aviation and Toyota Motor Corporation Launch Initial Phase of a Strategic Manufacturing Alliance to Realize Air Mobility for All
entry.content: Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY) and Toyota Motor Corporation today announced the initial phase of their strategic manufacturing alliance by establishing the Joint Venture to realize air mobility. This will combine Joby's pioneering work in electric aviation with Toyota's globally recognized expertise in production systems and operational excellence.

entry.title: Joby Aviation and Toyota Motor Corporation Launch Initial Phase of a Strategic Manufacturing Alliance to Realize Air Mobility for All
entry.content: SANTA CRUZ, Calif. and TOYOTA CITY, Japan (June 30, 2026) — Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY) and Toyota Motor Corporation today announced the initial phase of their strategic manufacturing alliance by establishing the Joint Venture to realize air mobility. This will combine Joby's pioneering work in electric aviation with Toyota's globally recognized expertise in production systems and operational excellence. The post Joby Aviation and Toyota Motor Corporation Launch Initial Phase of a Strate...

entry.title: [Toyota Times] From Japan to the World: Borderless Music, Collaboration, and Glamorous Awards
entry.content: In this special Toyota Times News feature, we cover the Music Way Project, a collaborative project between CEIPA (the Japan Culture and Entertainment Industry Promotion Association) and the Toyota Group, as well as Music Awards Japan.

entry.title: Akio Toyoda comment for Acropolis Rally Greece
entry.content: Takamoto, congratulations on another podium in third place. This season, we have seen you on the podium in half of the rallies so far. I am looking forward to seeing more of you in the second half of the season. One of my favourite memories from Rally Japan was Seb coming over to talk with me. Looking at this result, I'd be very happy if our conversation in that moment played even a small part in helping him achieve it. I'm looking forward to seeing what you can do in the second half of the s...

entry.title: Sales, Production, and Export Results for May 2026
entry.content: Toyota Motor Corporation announces its sales, production, and export results for May 2026, including those for subsidiaries Daihatsu Motor Co., Ltd.

entry.title: Acropolis Rally Greece: Day 4 Ogier triumphs for TGR-WRT in gruelling Greek epic
entry.content: Sebastien Ogier triumphed for TOYOTA GAZOO Racing World Rally Team on a decisive final day of a demanding edition of the Acropolis Rally in Greece.

entry.title: Acropolis Rally Greece: Day 4 - Ogier triumphs for TGR-WRT in gruelling Greek epic
entry.content: The legendary event lived up to its reputation this year with temperatures exceeding 30 degrees centigrade combining with extremely rough and rocky roads to test tyres, cars and drivers alike. TGR-WRT faced a particularly challenging start to the rally with its five drivers starting in the first five places courtesy of their strong championship positions and therefore sweeping a line through the loose gravel for their rivals to follow. Nine-time world champion Ogier had the best start positio...

entry.title: From Japan to the World: Borderless Music, Collaboration, and Glamorous Awards
entry.content: In this special Toyota Times News feature, we cover the Music Way Project, a collaborative project between CEIPA (the Japan Culture and Entertainment Industry Promotion Association) and the Toyota Group, as well as Music Awards Japan.

entry.title: Acropolis Rally Greece: Day 3 - TGR-WRT’s Ogier closes on the lead before final day decider
entry.content: Saturday’s action took place on the Peloponnesian peninsula to the west of the Loutraki service park, on a mix of roads that were either brand-new or not used by WRC since 2013. The initial loop of four stages was the longest to be driven on a single set of tyres during this event, at 74.08 competitive kilometres, with two stages to then be repeated in rougher second-pass conditions after a mid-afternoon service halt. Ogier began the day second overall, 9.7s behind the leader Thierry Neuville...

entry.title: Researchers Develop Integrated Workflows For Reliable Materials Discovery
entry.content: Researchers Develop Integrated Workflows For Reliable Materials Discovery

entry.title: Acropolis Rally Greece: Day 2 - Ogier and TGR-WRT in contention after first day on Greek gravel
entry.content: Following Thursday evening’s opening super special in Athens, cars and crews were transported by sea ferry through the Gulf of Corinth to Itea to begin what would be the longest day of the rally. A total of six stages were run through central Greece forming 129.22 competitive kilometres, and with only a remote service in the middle of the day in Livadia. With the five GR YARIS Rally1 drivers running in the first five positions on the road courtesy of their championship positions, they faced a...

entry.title: How AI and physical robotics are accelerating automation in manufacturing
entry.content: How AI and physical robotics are accelerating automation in manufacturing

entry.title: Toyota Mississippi’s 4T Academy Celebrates Inaugural Class
entry.content: Eleven seniors from New Albany and Union County High Schools graduated recently from Toyota’s 4T Academy, making history as the inaugural class at Toyota Mississippi. The program, designed to help students get under the hood of advanced manufacturing, includes classroom instruction, teamwork and training at Toyota Mississippi. In […] The post Toyota Mississippi’s 4T Academy Celebrates Inaugural Class appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Why Humanoid Robots Could Change the Way Work Gets Done?
entry.content: Why Humanoid Robots Could Change the Way Work Gets Done?

entry.title: Yuri Milner
entry.content: Yuri Milner

entry.title: Acropolis Rally Greece: Day 1 - Athens action begins TGR-WRT’s Acropolis adventure
entry.content: Ogier had earlier set the second-fastest time in the pre-event shakedown near Loutraki, which this year hosts the WRC service park for the first time since 2013. In contrast to the rough and rocky and mountain tests to come this weekend, the first competitive stage took place on smooth asphalt with a side-by-side super special stage in the Ellinikon area of the historic Greek capital Athens. Ogier went quickest through the first stage to claim the early rally lead by one second over team-mate...

entry.title: USC Studies Aim to Advance Self-Driving Cars, Transform Robot "Brains" and Understand Workplace AI Use
entry.content: USC Studies Aim to Advance Self-Driving Cars, Transform Robot "Brains" and Understand Workplace AI Use

entry.title: Toyota to build test track for self-driving cars
entry.content: Toyota to build test track for self-driving cars

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Tomikawa Takes on S-Tai: Will He See the Checkered Flag?
entry.content: The S-Tai Challenge gives amateur drivers a more accessible way into full-fledged racing. To share its appeal, Yuta Tomikawa makes his first appearance in the series. Despite a string of setbacks, he sets his sights on the checkered flag. Watch his journey here on Toyota Times.

entry.title: GAZOO Racing, Lexus and TOYOTA RACING celebrate the soul of sportscar craftsmanship at the Goodwood Festival of Speed
entry.content: This year’s Goodwood Festival of Speed has the theme “The Rivals – Epic Racing Duels”, celebrating how rivalry can become a catalyst for progress, motivating competitors to learn faster, push harder and redefine what is possible. GAZOO Racing (GR) and Lexus will bring that idea to life, presenting three striking new sports cars at the festival, which takes place in the grounds of Goodwood House in the south of England from 9 – 12 July. Born from motorsport rivalry and shaped by uncompromising...

entry.title: Tomikawa Takes on S-Tai: Will He See the Checkered Flag?
entry.content: The S-Tai Challenge gives amateur drivers a more accessible way into full-fledged racing. To share its appeal, Yuta Tomikawa makes his first appearance in the series, setting his sights on the checkered flag despite a string of setbacks.

entry.title: Toyota Kentucky Begins Assembly of All-New RAV4 Hybrid; Breaks Ground on Advanced Paint Facility
entry.content:
GEORGETOWN, Ky. (June 22, 2026) — Four decades strong, Toyota Kentucky continues moving forward, building on a legacy of investment, innovation and the people who have shaped its success. Supported by $2 billion in investments announced over the past two […] The post Toyota Kentucky Begins Assembly of
All-New RAV4 Hybrid; Breaks Ground on Advanced Paint Facility appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota Mobility Foundation (TMF) launches European Hydrogen Regions Initiative and opens a call for regional partners
entry.content: Berlin, 22.06.2026 - The initiative represents a new step in Toyota Mobility Foundation commitment to supporting the development of sustainable, low-carbon, and inclusive mobility and energy ecosystems across Europe, with hydrogen playing a key role in enabling the energy transition. Through the initiative, TMF will provide targeted support to promising European regions that have already begun developing regional hydrogen ecosystems but are currently facing challenges creating a sustainable e...

entry.title: Automate 2026 Opens Monday: NVIDIA Pavilion Marks Humanoid Robot Shift to Production
entry.content: Automate 2026 Opens Monday: NVIDIA Pavilion Marks Humanoid Robot Shift to Production

entry.title: Toyota Announces Executive Changes
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 19, 2026) – Toyota announced executive changes to its manufacturing, supply chain, and financial services operations designed to better serve its customers, drive continued growth, and advance its commitment to building where it sells. The post Toyota Announces Executive Changes appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Working With Dad: Toyota Team Members Share Their Stories
entry.content: This Father’s Day, we celebrate the dads and grown children whose Toyota journey has brought them closer together. Beyond family ties, they’ve shared milestones, memories and meaningful moments that have strengthened their bond both at home and at work. Joshua […] The post Working With Dad: Toyota Team Members Share Their Stories appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: 2026 Acropolis Rally Greece - TGR-WRT titans take title fight to Greek gravel
entry.content: At the halfway stage of the season, following a 1-2-3-4 finish on home roads at Rally Japan three weeks ago, TGR-WRT leads the manufacturers’ standings by 127 points while its five drivers occupy the top five places in the drivers’ standings. After winning in Japan, Elfyn Evans has a lead of 20 points ahead of Takamoto Katsuta. The team’s youngest drivers, Oliver Solberg and Sami Pajari, are third and fourth, 49 and 55 points respectively from the lead. Reigning champion Sébastien Ogier, a pr...

entry.title: Acropolis Rally Greece: Preview TGR-WRT titans take title fight to Greek gravel
entry.content: TOYOTA GAZOO Racing World Rally Team begins a sequence of seven successive gravel challenges that will decide the 2026 FIA World Rally Championship when the legendary Acropolis Rally in Greece stages round eight of the season.

entry.title: Toyota Recalls Certain Model Year 2026 Toyota bZ and Lexus RZ vehicles
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 18, 2026) — Toyota is conducting a safety recall involving certain model year 2026 bZ and Lexus RZ vehicles in North America. Approximately 16,200 vehicles are involved in this recall. The ECU for the battery supplying electricity to […] The post Toyota Recalls Certain Model Year 2026 Toyota bZ and Lexus RZ vehicles appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Hydrogen, Logistics, Workstyles--JAMA's Progress Report on the Seven Priority Challenges
entry.content: Seeking to fuel the countryâs economic growth and boost the appeal of a key national industry, the Japan Automobile Manufacturers Association has set out its âNew Seven Priority Challenges.â Many of these initiatives are now shifting into the implementati

entry.title: Inside Toyota R&D: Meet the Engineers Driving Innovation and Mobility
entry.content: At Toyota, mobility means more than just getting from point A to point B. It’s about creating seamless, enjoyable and sustainable experiences for our customers — whether they’re behind the wheel, powering their homes or exploring new ways to move. […] The post Inside Toyota R&D: Meet the Engineers Driving Innovation and Mobility appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota Motor Europe announces executive changes for 2026
entry.content: Brussels, Belgium - Toyota Motor Europe (TME) announces today executive level appointments at its European Headquarters and National Sales & Marketing Companies effective 1 st September 2026. Toyota Motor Europe (TME) Mr Ronald Hoedemakers will be appointed Vice President of Quality, replacing Mr Peter Rade who is retiring . National Marketing and Sales Companies (NMSCs) Toyota Austria (TAT) M r. Mesut Aslan will be appointed as Managing Director of Toyota Austria (TAT), taking over from Mr....

entry.title: Toyota Full-Line Pricing
entry.content: ﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿ The post Toyota Full-Line Pricing appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Superconductor x Hydrogen Engine: A World-First Challenge at the Fuji 24 Hours
entry.content: Once again in 2026, the hydrogen-powered GR Corolla joined in the Super Taikyu Fuji 24 Hours. This year, it became the first race car in the world to compete with a superconducting liquid hydrogen pump onboard.

entry.title: Toyota Mobility Foundation names Venice winners in Global Sustainable Cities Challenge
entry.content: VENICE (June 17, 2026) – The Toyota Mobility Foundation (TMF) and City of Venice today announced BetterPoints and OpenMove, in partnership with Factual Consulting, as the winners of Toyota Mobility Foundation’s Sustainable Cities Challenge (SCC) in Venice. The announcement marks the conclusion of the Venice section of TMF’s three-year global competition to support sustainable urban mobility solutions. In addition to Venice, Challenges were held simultaneously in Detroit, US and Varanasi, Indi...

entry.title: TMC Announces Changes to Board Members and Executive Structure
entry.content: Toyota Motor Corporation (TMC) today assigned members of the board of directors at its Ordinary General Shareholders' Meeting, and appointed representative directors and directors with special titles at a subsequent Board meeting. On the same day, TMC announced its executive appointments following the Ordinary General Shareholders' Meeting.

entry.title: Northwestern scientists screened 156 million nanoparticles in one afternoon and found a cheap metal blend that could finally replace the rarest ingredient in clean hydrogen
entry.content: Northwestern scientists screened 156 million nanoparticles in one afternoon and found a cheap metal blend that could finally replace the rarest ingredient in clean hydrogen

entry.title: Superconductor Ã Hydrogen Engine: A World-First Challenge at the Fuji 24 Hours
entry.content: Once again in 2026, the hydrogen-powered GR Corolla joined in the Super Taikyu Fuji 24 Hours. This year, it became the first race car in the world to compete with a superconducting liquid hydrogen pump onboard.

entry.title: Toyota Mississippi Featured on “Built in America” TV Series
entry.content: Toyota’s Corolla plant in Blue Springs, Mississippi is featured in the national Built in America series, highlighting the people, technology, and craftsmanship behind American manufacturing. The documentary style show highlights companies that manufacture in the U.S. and offers an inside […] The post Toyota Mississippi Featured on “Built in America” TV Series appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota Shows How It Is Turning Climate Goals Into Action On “Earth With John Holden” This Weekend
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 16, 2026) — Toyota Motor North America will be featured in an upcoming episode of Earth with John Holden, airing Sunday, June 21, on Bloomberg Television. The episode showcases Toyota's ongoing commitment to innovative environmental initiatives designed to help create a more sustainable future. The post Toyota Shows How It Is Turning Climate Goals Into Action On “Earth With John Holden” This Weekend appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: GRMN Corolla--A Car Built to Tackle the NÃ¼rburgring
entry.content: Sixty years after the arrival of the first-generation Corolla, Toyota has unveiled a new GRMN edition. We attended the media briefing held during Round 3 of the 2026 Super Taikyu Series, the Fuji 24 Hours.

entry.title: Built to Last: Toyota’s Mobility Journey
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 15, 2026) — Seven decades. In the life of a nation, it’s a chapter. In the life of an industry, it’s an evolution. But for one company, it has been a promise kept – a promise not just to sell cars in America, but to assemble them here, alongside the people who drive them. The post Built to Last: Toyota’s Mobility Journey appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Race - Message from Hiroki Nakajima (Executive Vice President) after the Le Mans 24 Hours victory
entry.content: To all the fans who fought with us at the Le Mans 24 Hours. To the ACO, FIA, marshals, and officials who supported the race. And to all our competitors who fought so hard for 24 hours. Thank you very much. First, to the drivers of car number 7 and to everyone in the team. Congratulations on this victory and thank you so much. This year's Le Mans was not an easy race. In qualifying our cars were 14th and 15th. It was not an ideal starting position. From there, our team members pooled their kno...

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Shining Light on the Genba - ABAJ Chairman Toyoda Speaks About His Role
entry.content: What will it take to make cars a more prominent part of Japanese culture? On the day of the Automobile Business & Culture Association of Japan's general meeting, Chairman Toyoda described his role as that of a lighting technician. What did he mean?

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Race Le Mans victory for TOYOTA RACING
entry.content: TOYOTA RACING overcame challenges during an intense battle through day and night to win an epic 94th Le Mans 24 Hours, the third round of the 2026 FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC).

entry.title: Le Mans victory for TOYOTA RACING
entry.content: A crowd of 350,105 fans watched an epic Hypercar contest in one of the closest and most unpredictable Le Mans 24 Hours for many years, which delivered TOYOTA’s sixth win in the legendary French race. Mike Conway, Kamui Kobayashi and Nyck de Vries completed a nerve-wracking win by just 10.913secs after 381 laps of relentless competition in their #7 TR010 HYBRID. For Mike and Kamui, it represents a second win after their 2021 triumph, while it is Nyck’s first overall win. Sébastien Buemi, Brend...

entry.title: Shining Light on the Genba--ABAJ Chairman Toyoda Speaks About His Role
entry.content: What will it take to make cars a more prominent part of Japanese culture? On the day of the Automobile Business & Culture Association of Japanâs general meeting, Chairman Toyoda described his role as that of a lighting technician. What did he mean?

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: 12H Update
entry.content: After starting from 14th, the #7 car gained positions on the track and via fast laps on a clear track thanks to an early fuel stop. However, it lost time due to a puncture after around three hours, dropping it out of the top 10. Strong pace from all drivers helped it move back into the top eight. An effective strategy and Sébastien’s pace on a clear track helped the #8 into the lead when his rivals pitted later in the opening hour, starting a three-way battle at the front which ran until a sa...

entry.title: Vivid Solar Project Harvests Energy with Flair
entry.content: A cross-functional team from Toyota’s Advanced Product Planning Office (APPO) and Toyota Research Institute of North America (TRINA) have found a way to combine vibrant color schemes with proven solar technology, resulting in innovative and appealing ways to harvest energy. […] The post Vivid Solar Project Harvests Energy with Flair appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On
entry.content: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On

entry.title: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On
entry.content: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On

entry.title: The all-new Toyota Hilux
entry.content: INTRODUCTION With a global reputation for exceptional toughness established across seven decades and with more than 27 million sales to its credit, it might be thought Hilux has little left to achieve. An icon of Toyota Quality, Durability and Reliability, it has taken all challenges in its stride. There are new horizons to explore, however. The all-new, ninth generation Hilux breaks fresh ground in technology and design while retaining the exceptional performance capabilities that have long...

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Free Practice and Hyperpole - TOYOTA RACING confirms Le Mans grid positions
entry.content: The #7 TR010 HYBRID of Mike Conway, Kamui Kobayashi and Nyck de Vries will line up 14th on the grid when the race begins at 4pm CEST on Saturday, with Sébastien Buemi, Brendon Hartley and Ryō Hirakawa just behind, in 15th, in the #8 TR010 HYBRID. Kamui Kobayashi and Ryō Hirakawa took the wheel of their respective cars for Hyperpole 1, aiming to be among the fastest 10 to progress. Their first flying laps initially put them in the top 10, and after a stop for new soft Michelin tyres, both look...

entry.title: Three robotics breakthroughs signal shift toward real-world deployment
entry.content: Three robotics breakthroughs signal shift toward real-world deployment

entry.title: Celebrating 25 Years of Sweet Home Toyota Alabama
entry.content: HUNTSVILLE, Ala. (June 11, 2026) – In 2001, Toyota made its home in Alabama, and now, plenty of big wheels are turning thanks to the nearly 1 million engines and 500,000 differentials assembled every year at the Huntsville plant. What started as a $220 million investment has grown into an unshakable $1.7 billion advanced manufacturing facility. The post Celebrating 25 Years of Sweet Home Toyota Alabama appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On
entry.content: Daisuke Toyoda, Senior Vice President of Woven by Toyota, and Toyota Timesâ Yuta Tomikawa are neighbors in Woven City. Here, these two Weavers sit down to discuss life in the city and the future they envision for it.

entry.title: Toyota Celebra La Pasión Inquebrantable De Los Fans Latinos Con Una Campaña De Fútbol Basada En El Aguante
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (11 de junio de 2026) — Este verano, Toyota destaca la pasión inquebrantable de los fans latinos por el fútbol con el lanzamiento de “El aguante es lo nuestro”, una campaña de enfoque cultural que celebra la fe, […] The post Toyota Celebra La Pasión Inquebrantable De Los Fans Latinos Con Una Campaña De Fútbol Basada En El Aguante appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota Celebrates Latino Fans’ Unwavering Passion with Soccer Campaign Rooted in Endurance
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 11, 2026) — This summer, Toyota is spotlighting the unwavering passion of Latino soccer fans with the launch of “Endurance Is Our Game,” a culturally driven campaign that celebrates belief, resilience, and the refusal to give up. Inspired by the insight that Latino fútbol fans stay committed through every high and low, the campaign draws a powerful parallel between that enduring spirit and Toyota trucks which are built to go the distance. The post Toyota Celebrates Latino F...

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours – LH2 Demonstration
entry.content: The TR LH2 Racing Prototype is based on the same chassis as the TR010 HYBRID Hypercar which will compete in the Le Mans 24 Hours on 13-14 June. It is intended to advance the development of hydrogen technology in motorsports. This activity supports Toyota’s continuous development of hydrogen technology and infrastructure, as well as helping build relationships to expand the possibilities of hydrogen through the challenge of motorsports. Toyota has taken on the challenge of hydrogen engine deve...

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Free practice and qualifying
entry.content: The real track action on the Circuit de la Sarthe began with free practice, prior to qualifying. Five hours of free practice took place either side of qualifying, when the 15 Hypercars which will progress to Hyperpole on Thursday – as well as the starting grid positions for those outside the top-15 – is determined.

entry.title: Taking Japanese Music Global: Where the MUSIC WAY PROJECT Stands Now
entry.content: The Japan Culture and Entertainment Industry Promotion Association (CEIPA) announced its partnership with the Toyota Group in 2025. We asked Board Member Yutaka Inaba why CEIPA was formed and what it hopes the Toyota Group will bring.

entry.title: Together We Are Stronger: Toyota’s vision for Europe focuses on inclusion and pragmatism in support of the EU’s ambition to stimulate competitiveness and decarbonise its automotive industry
entry.content: Brussels, 10 th June 2026 – speaking at the Automotive News Europe Congress, Yoshihiro Nakata, President & CEO of Toyota Motor Europe (TME), set out Toyota’s vision for a competitive, resilient and decarbonised European automotive industry, calling for inclusive partnerships, technological diversity and regulatory pragmatism. He highlighted targeted adjustments to the proposed Industrial Accelerator Act and Automotive Package, aimed at strengthening Europe’s global competitiveness whilst deli...

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Rally Japan 2026 | Toyota Sweeps Top 4! First May Rally Deepens Community Ties
entry.content: Rally Japan 2026 was held in May for the first time. Behind Toyota's achievement of sweeping the top four spots was unified local community support.

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Activities - TOYOTA RACING connecting with fans at the track and beyond
entry.content: Two TR010 HYBRID Hypercars will compete at the Circuit de la Sarthe in front of around 300,000 fans on 13-14 June, seeking the team’s sixth Le Mans victory. Fans anywhere in the world can follow the team’s progress via TOYOTA RACING’s dedicated Le Mans 24 Hours website, www.toyota-racing.com/le-mans-special-2026, which features live onboard cameras from free practice, qualifying and the race, as well as other content. The website also displays a new key visual for Le Mans which highlights its...

entry.title: What’s the most promising thing about the Boston tech scene? Here’s what 25 Tech Power Players said.
